channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Persona 6 exists, and that’s all we know
item.description: This year's Summer Game Fest turned out to be a good one for fans of Japanese RPGs. First, the conclusion of the Final Fantasy VII remake trilogy was announced at SGF Live, and now we have the long-awaited return of the Persona series. Atlus confirmed Persona 6 exists with a brief teaser, but aside from […]

item.title: 'There is a liar in these tunnels' — Metro 2039 gets new action-packed trailer, teasing first-person stealth-action gameplay, a new stealth weapon, and a February 2027 release window
item.description: 4A Games has revealed a brand new gameplay trailer for Metro 2039, as well as a February 2027 launch window for PC, PlayStation, and Xbox.

item.title: This new limited edition Series X looks like the ultimate machine for Xbox lovers
item.description: Xbox has revealed a new limited edition Series X console.

item.title: Notion restores access to Anthropic after service disruption
item.description: Notion's head of product said he was "astonished" at “the amount of people RT-ing this."

item.title: Crazy Taxi World Tour reboots the series in 2027
item.description: Get ready to yell "Yah yah yah yah yah" all over again.

item.title: Microsoft’s Xbox 25th anniversary console comes in translucent green
item.description: Microsoft has created a special edition Xbox Series X to celebrate 25 years of the console. The Xbox 25th anniversary console takes design cues from the original Xbox console, with both the console and controller featuring a translucent green design. "For the first time, we're bringing a translucent design to Xbox Series X, drawing inspiration […]

item.title: Senua is back! — Ninja Theory just unveiled the next Hellblade game, and it looks amazing
item.description: Ninja Theory has announced Senua, the next game in its ongoing Hellblade series, and it's launching in 2027.

item.title: Minecraft Dungeons 2 gets a September release date
item.description: Minecraft Dungeons 2, a sequel to Microsoft's dungeon crawler spinoff Minecraft Dungeons, will be released on September 29th. The company originally revealed the game in a brief trailer in March, promising a fall 2026 release window. Here's how Microsoft described it at the time: Return to the world of Minecraft Dungeons in an all new […]

item.title: Halo: Campaign Evolved hits PS5, Xbox and PC on July 28
item.description: Take a peek at the new missions in the refreshed Halo.

item.title: Adachi fans rise up — Persona 4 Revival finally has an official release date
item.description: Persona 4 Revival finally has an official release date.

item.title: World Cup 2026 Match Finder
item.description: World Cup 2026 Match Finder – Search any team and see when they're playing and where to watch for free

item.title: Prix cassé : ce casque Bluetooth Sennheiser et ses 50h d’autonomie chute sous les 100 €
item.description: Le Sennheiser Accentum Wireless est un casque Bluetooth complet qui mêle confort, endurance et bonne restitution sonore pour seulement 99 euros.

item.title: 'It's only fitting' — Sorry PS5 owners, Gears of War: E-Day will be an Xbox console exclusive when it launches in October
item.description: Microsoft has officially confirmed a release date for Gears of War: E-Day and confirmed that it will be an Xbox console launch exclusive.

item.title: Gears of War E-Day arrives October 6 as an Xbox and PC exclusive
item.description: One of Microsoft's biggest gaming franchises is sticking with Xbox.

item.title: Fable launches in late February after recent delay
item.description: Just a few days after pushing Fable out of 2026, Microsoft showed off more footage of Fable, the first new entry in the storied RPG franchise since 2010's Fable III, at its Xbox Games Showcase on Sunday. The company also announced a specific release date: February 23rd, 2027. Though if you get the Premium Edition, […]

item.title: Halo: Campaign Evolved arrives July 28th
item.description: As part of its Xbox Games Showcase on Sunday, Microsoft revealed new details about Halo: Campaign Evolved, the upcoming remake of Halo: Combat Evolved's campaign mode. The remake will debut on Xbox Series S / X, PC, and PS5 on July 28th. Today's mission trailer includes a first look at Operation: Meteorite, a new three-mission […]

item.title: Gears of War: E-Day isn’t coming to the PS5
item.description: Apparently, the "return of Xbox" means a retreat from other platforms. At its Xbox Games Showcase today, Microsoft revealed that Gears of War: E-Day - which was previously rumored for a PS5 launch in addition to Xbox and PC - will not be coming to PlayStation. It'll be an Xbox console exclusive and is launching […]

item.title: Quels sont les meilleurs câbles USB-C selon vos besoins ? Notre sélection
item.description: L'USB-C est devenu la norme. Ce port multifonction équipe presque tous nos appareils électroniques : smartphones, casques, PC portables, consoles... alors, comment choisir un câble USB-C de bonne qualité, notamment pour profiter d'une recharge efficace ?

item.title: The Verge Weekend Questionnaire
item.description: Have you ever wondered what the most indispensable app is for your favorite musician or how the world’s tech CEOs stay focused? Well, that’s the sort of thing we aim to uncover in our Verge Weekend Questionnaire. Think of it as a spiritual successor to Five Minutes on the Verge. Every Saturday, a different guest […]

item.title: ‘Most people don’t wake up wanting to buy a foldable’: I'm convinced Apple’s iPhone Ultra will finally make foldables mainstream — but not because of the hardware
item.description: Rumors surrounding the iPhone Ultra are heating up, and I'm convinced that Apple's first foldable will succeed — here's why.

item.title: The developer of the Silent Hill 2 remake is releasing a Star Trek horror game
item.description: Bloober Team's Star Trek: Shadow Frontier is coming in 2027 to PC and consoles.

item.title: Xbox Games Showcase 2026: All the news and trailers
item.description: The console industry is in a weird place, and both Xbox and PlayStation have a chance to change the narrative a bit with their showcases at Summer Game Fest. Sony did that by focusing on the single-player titles it’s known for, and now it’s Microsoft’s turn. The Xbox Games Showcase airs on June 7th at […]

item.title: Fatal Fury to join the ranks of fighting games-turned-movies
item.description: Get ready for films, TV shows, and a webtoon based on SNK South Town games like "Fatal Fury" and "Art of Fighting."

item.title: OpenAI is still working on that ‘super app’
item.description: "Chat is dead" — at least, according to a senior OpenAI employee.

item.title: OpenAI reportedly has a major ChatGPT overhaul in store
item.description: The revamped AI tool will roll out in the coming weeks, according to The Financial Times.
